word: H6264 - עָתִיד - ʻâthîyd - aw-theed' - Things that shall come

sections.paragraph:
Original: עתיד

Transliteration: ‛âthı̂yd

Phonetic: aw-theed'

BDB Definition:

  1. ready, prepared
    1. ready
    2. ready, skilled
    3. prepared, impending
    4. prepared, stored up, treasure

Origin: from H6257

TWOT entry: 1719a

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
